details.note: New file with PlatformPathKey type, PlatformPaths interface, ElectronPlatformPaths class (wraps electron app), BrowserPlatformPaths class (no electron import)
Removed direct electron app import, added PlatformPaths injection via setStorePlatformPaths(), replaced app.getPath() with platformPaths.getPath()
Added setConfigPlatformPaths(), updaterEnabledForPlatform() alongside backward-compatible UPDATER_ENABLED
Added platform-abstracted getAppIdentityForPlatform() alongside existing getAppIdentity()
